form.formComment: Improved last start with a solid effort despite getting well back, when 3rd (Fr9) over 2300m at this track, at the bell was 3rd-9.46 beaten 7 m by Heeza Malteeza (2:43.00) in NR up to 80 on March 27 at $23. Should get his chance from the ace draw.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Worked forward to the lead passing the 1300m.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr6) over 1609m at this track, beaten 22 m by Miki Cohen (1:52.50) in NR up to 75 on March 31 at $26. Before that 6th (Fr1) over 1609m at this track, at the bell was 7th-13.76 beaten 9 m by Double Fear (1:52.30) in NR up to 75 on March 24 at $34. Draws well but needs improvement.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked passing the 200m when Mr Teddy was checked and paced roughly.

form.formComment: Resuming after a spell of ten weeks. Ran only once last campaign running when well beaten into ninth after showing early speed, behind Lenneth at this track over 1609m in a NR up to 75 on January 31 at $3.10. Capable of more than he has shown recently. Can open the campaign with a forward performance.

form.formComment: Last start 9th (Fr5) over 2260m at Bathurst beaten 45 m by Ripp (2:42.50) in No NR on March 28 at $9.50. Inconvenienced on the final turn by Silver Pistol.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 10th (Fr10) over 1609m at this track, at the bell was 7th-13.01 beaten 12 m by Hugo Maguire (1:51.30) in No NR on March 27 at $81. Before that, a solid effort despite getting well back, when 2nd (Fr8) over 1609m at this track, at the bell was 8th-14.68 beaten 4 m by Michaywey (1:51.80) in NR up to 85 on March 21 at $71. Big chance dropping in grade.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up in the home straight and not fully tested.
Raced roughly in the latter stages of the score up.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 6th (Fr10) over 1609m at this track was 9th-16.82 at the bell, beaten 5 m by Miki Cohen (1:52.90) in NR up to 75 on April 7 at $19. Two runs back won by a head as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr2) at Penrith (2:04.40) beating Time To Dance in NR up to 65 on January 8 at $1.33 at the bell was leading 1.7m on the pegs. Can improve sharply.
